bridal.description: Heavy traditional jewellery matches elaborate bridal outfits with rich fabrics

traditional.description: Traditional jewellery enhances Indian ethnic wear with heritage silhouettes

contemporary.description: Contemporary jewellery bridges traditional craftsmanship with modern silhouettes

casual.description: Casual jewellery adds personality to everyday outfits without overwhelming

minimalist.description: Minimalist jewellery lets clean lines and quality fabrics speak for themselves

fusion.description: Fusion jewellery celebrates the meeting of cultures and style traditions

gold.tip: Gold jewellery creates warmth — pair with rich, saturated colors for drama

silver.tip: Silver jewellery suits cool tones — midnight blue or crisp white are perfect

diamond.tip: Diamonds work with virtually any color — let the cut and clarity shine

rose-gold.tip: Rose gold has a romantic warmth — soft, muted palettes are its natural home

platinum.tip: Platinum's cool sheen is at its best against rich darks or crisp neutrals

pearl.tip: Pearls carry soft elegance — pastels and whites let their luster glow

wedding.tip: Coordinate all pieces in the same metal family for a cohesive bridal look

office.tip: Less is more at the office — one statement piece with simple studs works best

party.tip: Parties are for bold choices — statement earrings or a layered necklace steals the show

daily.tip: Daily wear should be comfortable and durable — avoid pieces with sharp edges

festival.tip: Festivals celebrate culture — embrace bold traditional pieces with vibrant colors

styling_rules: Match metals within a single outfit — mixing gold and silver requires intention
Balance heavy statement pieces with simpler companions
Necklace length should complement your neckline — V-neck → pendant, high-neck → long chain
Updos showcase chandelier earrings; studs work with every hairstyle
Bridal sets look best when all metals and stones are coordinated
Minimalist stacking: odd numbers (3 or 5 rings) look more natural than even
Skin tone matters: warm skin glows with gold and rose gold; cool skin shines with silver and platinum
